input.headline: Past vice presidents make rare appearance together at Cheney’s funeral

raw.headline: Past vice presidents make rare appearance together at Cheney’s funeral

winner: I tried to attend Cheney's funeral, but the bouncer said I couldn't because I wasn't a past vice president — apparently, they're having a "former" only event.

candidates.text: With all those former vice presidents showing up at the funeral, it’s safe to say the line for the afterlife is getting quite presidential.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Puns on 'presidential' and the context of vice presidents at a funeral are clever and specific, with natural wordplay and brevity."}

candidates.text: They said it was a funeral, but really, it was just the first time in decades that the ex-presidents actually listened to Dick Cheney's jokes.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on the event, specific reference to Dick Cheney's jokes, concise and natural phrasing."}

candidates.text: Dick Cheney's funeral was so historic, they had to break out the VP body bag—literally.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Puns on 'VP body bag' are clever and specific, tying the joke directly to the headline with a surprising twist."}

candidates.text: Cheney's funeral was so exclusive, even the past vice presidents had to RSVP—but their collective "no" made it a full house!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on exclusivity, concise and specific with clever wordplay on 'RSVP' and 'full house'."}

candidates.text: The funeral was so exclusive, even past vice presidents had to RSVP twice—once for the service, once just to see who else showed up.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on exclusivity, specific to the context, concise, and uses natural humor with a clever play on RSVP."}

candidates.text: I tried to attend Cheney's funeral, but the bouncer said I couldn't because I wasn't a past vice president — apparently, they're having a "former" only event.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the play on 'former' only event, but it's a bit generic and relies on a common punchline structure. It lacks specificity and surprise compared to stronger jokes in the category."}

candidates.text: They said it was a somber occasion, but when the past vice presidents showed up, it turned out to be a rare case of " Cheney-ography.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Puns on 'Cheney-ography' (a play on 'genealogy') are clever and specific, fitting the context of past vice presidents gathering. The joke is concise, surprising, and naturally worded."}

candidates.text: The former vice presidents were so shocked to see each other at the funeral that they spent the entire service arguing over who actually had to stand in the corner.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat specific and has a mild surprise element, but the humor is weak and relies on a tired premise about political figures arguing. It lacks originality and fails to land with much impact."}

candidates.text: The former vice presidents were so honored to be invited that they actually stood in a line and waited for Cheney to finish his funeral before they all collectively sat down to have a meeting about how to stand up again.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and specific, but the setup is a bit convoluted and the punchline feels forced. It lacks brevity and some natural flow."}
